title: Taxi Trogir to Skradin | Fixed €100 Transfer | TAXI Antonio
description: Private taxi and transfer from Trogir to Skradin. Fixed €100 per car, up to 4 passengers, door to door. Book direct with Antonio.
keywords: taxi trogir to skradin, transfer trogir to skradin, trogir to skradin taxi, trogir to skradin transfer

schema.name: Taxi Trogir to Skradin
schema.description: Private, fixed-price taxi and transfer from Trogir to Skradin, 100 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, door to door.

offers.description: One-way private transfer from Trogir to Skradin, per car for up to 4 passengers. Return 200 euros.

mainEntity.name: How far is Skradin from Trogir, and how long is the drive?

acceptedAnswer.text: The drive from Trogir to Skradin is around 65 km and takes roughly 60 min in normal traffic, a little longer at busy times in summer. I plan the pickup so a slow patch never leaves you rushed.

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi from Trogir to Skradin?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 100 per car for up to 4 passengers, one way, with tolls, fuel and luggage included. A return trip is 200.

mainEntity.name: Is the transfer private or shared?

acceptedAnswer.text: Every transfer is private and door to door, in a Škoda Superb. No vehicle sharing and no extra stops unless you ask for them.

mainEntity.name: Can you stop along the way?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. On the longer routes I am happy to stop for a coffee, a photo or a quick sight. Just let me know when booking.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can confirm the car and your pickup time. For a sooner ride, call or WhatsApp me directly.
